calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-20-2008 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-07-2008 Continued To Mar-28-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Feb-07-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.
Francisco Torres, Esq. appeared for plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority.
No appearance by defendant Timothy Ray Harris.
Default entered against defendant - 12/11/07.
Order re: waiver of witness testimony at prove-up hearing filed 01/18/08.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Timothy Ray Harris as follows: Defendant is enjoined and restrained from being within 150 yards of any and all San Francisco Housing Authority property, and is therefore ordered to stay-away at least 150 yards from any and all San Francisco Housing Authority property, perpetually pursuant to California Code of Civil Procedure section 526.

Judgment for injuncitve relief to abate a public nuisance caused by the conduct and activities of defendant Timothy Ray Harris was submitted to and signed by the Court.
